title: NYC Aging (DFTA) — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department for the Aging (DFTA / 'NYC Aging') object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DFTA Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/dfta, and the Aging Connect information-and-referral intake. Includes the NYC geography spine and DFTA's own contracted-provider key (DFTA ID) and provider-type vocabulary.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

WeeklyHours.description: Open/close times per day of week, as carried by the provider directories ('MonHourOpen'/'MonHourClose', etc.).

ProviderType.description: DFTA contracted-service / provider category ('ProviderType'). Values from the All Contracted Providers dataset.

DftaProviderReference.description: A reference to a DFTA-funded provider/program by its DFTA ID and sponsor.

dftaId.description: DFTA contract/program identifier ('DFTA ID' / 'DFTA_ID' / 'dftaid') — NYC Aging's primary provider key.
